name: California Vegetable Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 each Ball whole wheat pizza dough (see recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 500°F and oil a 12-inch pizza pan.
2 Place dough on a lightly floured surface and press to flatten. Roll out the dough into a 12-inch circle, place it on the pizza pan, and pinch the edge to form a rim.
3 Spread the sauce on the dough, leaving about 1 inch from the rim. Arrange the vegetables on top of the sauce, placing the tomatoes and peppers last.
4 Bake until the crust is brown and crisp, approximately 15 minutes. Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes. Slice and serve hot.
